text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle takes me to a mall to shop for skin
care products on our day off...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't look like they have it here either. But
nothin' else'll do...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... If I don't get my hands on some, my skin's
gonna be as dry as the desert at high noon...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well, truth is I've never seen it in Japan before.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Guess there's nothing to do but wait for my family to send me some.
